company.name: Yangon Tyre
company.footprint: Yangon plant, procurement, and distributor network

query_profiles.internal_ytf: (from:htinkyawoo@yangontyre.com OR from:htoo.maw@mptmail.net.mm OR from:htoomaw.ytf@gmail.com OR to:htinkyawoo@yangontyre.com OR yangon OR tyre OR ytf) newer_than:365d
query_profiles.supplier_kiic: (zhuangshidong OR KIIC OR (from:htinkyawoo@yangontyre.com AND (KIIC OR zhuangshidong))) newer_than:365d
query_profiles.supplier_junky: (from:j2135.junky@msa.hinet.net OR junky OR cheng OR (from:htinkyawoo@yangontyre.com AND (junky OR cheng))) newer_than:365d
query_profiles.supplier_forwarded: (from:htinkyawoo@yangontyre.com AND (KIIC OR zhuangshidong OR junky OR cheng OR supplier OR quotation OR shipment)) newer_than:365d
query_profiles.quality_watch: ((quality OR claim OR complaint OR defect OR reject OR ncr OR capa) AND (yangon OR tyre OR ytf OR supplier OR KIIC OR junky)) newer_than:365d
query_profiles.relevant_all: ((yangon OR tyre OR ytf OR KIIC OR junky OR zhuangshidong) OR from:htinkyawoo@yangontyre.com) newer_than:365d

templates.title: YTF Daily Ops Update
templates.description: Daily production and operating pulse from each team.

templates.title: YTF Quality Incident Log
templates.description: Incident and CAPA intake for DQMS follow-up.

due_date_rules: high quality issues close target within 7 days
supplier delay follow-up assigned same day
escalation_rules: critical supplier or quality risks escalate to director
approval_rules: close CAPA only with evidence attached

search_queries.name: quality
search_queries.query: claim OR complaint OR defect OR reject OR nonconformance OR ncr OR capa

week_1: daily owner queue from ops and supplier signals
month_1: measurable closure discipline on open incidents
